//: Example of what the sordino plugin's /sordino:enable writes into a project's
//enable: .claude/settings.json (it picks a free per-project port, then sets env +
//enable2: a status line, and seeds a starter sordino.toml). The SessionStart hook
//enable3: that launches the proxy is provided by the PLUGIN, not this file.
//warn: ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL points Claude Code at this project's local proxy.
//warn2: The port is per-project (each project gets its own isolated proxy).
